metadata.title: India — the swing power: DPI template, semiconductor build, Russian oil, and the US critical-minerals tilt
metadata.status: facts from gov/Al-Jazeera/CFR/press; the 'pivotal hedge, not a captive ally' framing is labeled interpretation
metadata.frame: India is the one large power that is courted by both blocs and captured by neither - the swing vote in the AI/materials/identity contest the rest of the corpus maps. It (1) wrote the DPI/Aadhaar blueprint the WEST is now adopting (digitalid-orchestration), (2) is building a semiconductor base (behind, but moving), (3) keeps buying discounted RUSSIAN oil while (4) signing a US critical-minerals pact to counter China. Strategic autonomy as policy. Overlay; excluded from the proofs. Connects to digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive (India-Stack template), geopolitics-chip-chokepoint-war, macro-critical-minerals-equities, geopolitics-russia-energy-arctic.

dpi_template.what: India's DPI - Aadhaar (~1.4B biometric IDs) + UPI - is the global blueprint for population-scale digital identity + payments, exported via the G20/World-Bank channel (digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive). India now frames DPI as the base layer for sovereign AI ('IndiaAI Mission'; Aadhaar's chief tied to the AI push) and is pushing 'DPI sovereignty' from software into hardware/cloud/AI. status: fact.
dpi_template.read: the world's largest biometric-ID state authored the model the West's digital-ID stack is copying - India is upstream of the control-rail thesis, not downstream of it.

semiconductors.what: India Semiconductor Mission 2.0: Tata Electronics + Taiwan's PSMC targeting first silicon at the Dholera (Gujarat) fab by late 2026; Micron's ATMP (assembly/test/packaging) plant in Sanand inaugurated 28 Feb 2026 - the first operational facility of the cycle; Budget 2026-27 put ~Rs 8,000 crore into the mission (largest single-year outlay). status: fact.
semiconductors.reality_check: India is years behind Taiwan/Korea on the leading edge and starts in packaging/mature nodes - a real build, not parity. status: fact + interpretation.

russian_oil.what: Russia became India's dominant crude supplier - ~33% of India's crude in FY-ending-Mar-2026 (down from a ~36% peak) - bought at a discount via the shadow-fleet system (geopolitics-russia-energy-arctic). India trimmed volumes under US trade pressure but did not cut Russia off. status: fact.
russian_oil.read: India monetizes the West's sanctions (cheap Russian barrels) while staying inside the US tech/minerals orbit - the swing-power move.

us_critical_minerals_tilt.what: India + the US signed a critical-minerals / rare-earths FRAMEWORK (May 2026) covering mining, processing, recycling and tech for clean energy, semiconductors and defense - explicitly to counter China's dominance (the same chokepoint the macro-critical-minerals-equities cohort attacks). status: fact.
us_critical_minerals_tilt.read: the US is pulling India toward its bloc with chips + minerals (as with the Gulf, fin-gulf-sovereign-ai-capital), but India keeps Russian oil + BRICS optionality - alignment without capture.

the_strategic_position: India practices 'strategic autonomy' / multi-alignment: a US tilt on tech, chips and minerals; Russian energy; BRICS membership; its own DPI export agenda. It is courted by both blocs and captive to neither - the pivotal hedge in the very contests the corpus maps (compute, materials, identity, energy). Where the Gulf bought into the US bloc for chips (and was walled off from China), India takes the chips AND keeps the Russian oil AND exports its own identity model - the swing power that can tilt the balance without joining a side.

sources.name: Al Jazeera - India, US strike critical minerals deal: what's in it, why it matters (May 2026)
Cleanroom Technology - Micron opens India's first semiconductor ATMP facility (Sanand)
CFR - Oil energy, India-US relations, and the Russia conundrum
Biometric Update - India pushes for strategic autonomy in biometrics, DPI and AI
TechPolicy.Press - India's digital infrastructure is going global: what kind of power is it building?
